---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new module, detection technique, or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: niteshghimire0147
---

## Summary
Brief description of the feature.

## Motivation
Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## OWASP Reference (if applicable)
- Category: [e.g. A03:2021 Injection]
- Link: [e.g. https://owasp.org/Top10/A03_2021-Injection/]

## Proposed Implementation
How should this work? Include:
- Detection method
- Payload strategy
- Expected output format

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative approaches you've considered.
